title: anatherum virginicum subvar. mohrii
intro: Anatherum virginicum subvar. mohrii, also known as Mohria fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mohria fern include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against infections. Traditionally, Mohria fern is prepared as a tea or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although its use should be limited to experienced herbalists due to potential toxicity.
